weather.label: Terminal work still moves, but the window added 3 issues and 0 merges.
ups: Open PR stays at 4, and the new inflow is limited to #834 / #835 / #836 instead of spilling into random surfaces.
PR #811 kept moving, so #806 / #818 terminal recovery work is still on a real merge surface.
#825 stays closed, which means the third client shell already landed and T is not pure churn.
downs: Merged PR is still 0 in this coverage window, so R / T / Z activity has not converted into shipped results yet.
#836 exposed the PTY fullscreen entry as Not Found, widening the terminal story from recovery semantics to route entry regressions.
#527 / #532 / #731 still have no new cross-device verification evidence, so the sync P0 line remains frozen.

mainlines.name: Agent terminal lifecycle and recovery closure

subtasks.text: #825 RT-native CLI shell is closed and gives T one landed client-side anchor.
PR #811 is still OPEN with mergeState=UNSTABLE, so #806 has not crossed into a merged wave yet.
#818 cross-RT restart recovery is still OPEN and still lacks a finished evidence chain.
#836 surfaced a fresh fullscreen PTY route regression on the same terminal surface.
#831 is closed and gives the RT session line one more completed foothold.
#823 tool calls and history replay are still OPEN.
#828 Windows dev-runtime fake loading is still OPEN.
#812 agent prompt state hydration is still OPEN.

mainlines.name: Client system and UI System convergence

subtasks.text: PR #815 / #819 / #826 are already merged, so the ordinary page shell migration did land.
#807 stays OPEN, so the umbrella client-system epic is not closed yet.
#834 reopened smoke on the TaskDag surface, so Q is no longer a pure done island.
#527 phone-to-desktop RT SQLite sync is still OPEN.
#532 RT plus ECS cross-device sync is still OPEN.
#731 hotspot Android-to-Android validation is still OPEN.

headlines.title: #836 turned the Agent PTY fullscreen entry into a direct Not Found regression on the T surface.
headlines.body: #836 now sits next to #806 / #818 / #824, so the terminal story is no longer only about recovery semantics; it now includes route entry closure too.

headlines.title: Open Issues rose from 294 to 297, and every new item was #834 / #835 / #836.
headlines.body: The new inflow did not create a brand new front; it stacked onto known Q / X / T surfaces: TaskDag regression, Tauri-Termux boundary research, and Agent terminal entry failure.

headlines.title: PR #811 kept moving but remains OPEN and UNSTABLE, while merged PR stayed at 0 in this window.
headlines.body: #806 work is still execution-side, and #818 plus #823 / #824 have not turned into a fresh merged wave yet.

scorecard.text: Keep #832 in the post-#501 enhancement stream instead of reopening old DAG wrap-up scope.
scorecard.note: #832 stays open on its own track; the old Q wrap-up items remain closed and the new smoke is isolated as #834.

scorecard.text: Keep settings persistence implementation scoped to #756 / #813 instead of flowing back to #504.
scorecard.note: #504 stays closed and #756 / #813 remain the live implementation path.

scorecard.text: Push PR #811 and collapse #823 / #824 / #828 / #829 into a reviewable terminal-session contract.
scorecard.note: PR #811 is still open, and #836 added one more terminal-facing gap while #823 / #824 / #829 remain open.

scorecard.text: Re-open a real verification window for #527 / #532 / #731.
scorecard.note: This window still carries no fresh sync verification evidence.

scorecard.text: Create a new merged PR wave.
scorecard.note: 04-05 02:39 +08 to now still shows merged PR = 0.

基于用户历史与当下状态的图形化交互式功能导航
bug: 多实例并发导致 EventLog 重复写入（开3个外心=重复3次）
tracking: 任务与时间块解耦、关联语义与反馈联动状态更新
feat(dev): 开发态多实例窗口标题辨认与实例诊断信息

actions.text: Put PR #811 and #836 into one manual verification pass so fullscreen entry, recovery entry, and reconnect behavior get checked together.
actions.detail: The newly exposed gap and the main implementation both live on the same T surface.

actions.text: Use #818 / #823 / #824 / #829 to write one session-terminal-RT alignment sheet and keep one RT restart replay trace as evidence.
actions.detail: The missing piece is no longer direction; it is a replayable contract story that survives restart.

actions.text: Schedule one real cross-device regression slot for #527 / #532 / #731 and attach one verifiable evidence record back to the issues.
actions.detail: Without evidence, the sync P0 line will keep turning steady windows into frozen backlog.

insight.text: This window did not invent a new direction. It proved that known surfaces are still leaking: #834 / #835 / #836 all landed on batches that were already visible in the route. That means the repo does not primarily lack planning; it lacks closure on terminal, client-system, and termux-boundary edges that are already named. Open Issues going from 294 to 297 is therefore not random backlog growth; it is known scope continuing to emit fresh smoke while PR #811 still has not converted into a merged wave.
insight.author: 外心史官·Windows [Codex GPT-5]
